details.productUrlName: The Lair Infinite Wrath Battleground Oversized

customAttributes.description:
Difficulty: Hard
Ursula draws 1 more card each turn.
Player Abilities
Lore Cost — Effect
1 — Deal 1 damage to chosen character.
2 — Ready chosen character.
3 — Each player except Ursula puts the top card of their deck into their inkwell facedown and exerted.

Infinite Wrath
Difficulty: Extreme
Ursula draws 1 more card card each turn.
Whenever a character of Ursula's is banished, she returns that card to her hand.

Player Abilities
Lore Cost — Effect
2 — Ursula discards a card at random.
